caption: A man is recorded in a studio setting featuring dark, ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears a grey t-shirt, black over-ear headphones, and a grey baseball cap featuring a logo of a stylized, open-mouthed creature. A tattoo is visible on his right upper arm. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm; the arm bears the text "Sennheiser Studio MK4". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a consistent position, speaking into the microphone. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and his facial expression shifts slightly between frames. No other people are present, and the background remains static, with the focus remaining entirely on the man as he addresses the microphone.
